title: DeviceInsights
description: The insights details associated with the device.

lastSeen.description: The ISO UTC timestamp when the device was last seen.

firstSeen.description: The ISO UTC timestamp when the device was first seen.

lastSeenDays.description: Number of of days since the device was last seen. If the device has not been observed before, lastSeenDays will be 0.

firstSeenDays.description: Number of days since the device was first seen. If the device has not been observed before, firstSeenDays will be 0.

accountDeviceId.description: This field contains the account device identification hash. If hashedAccountId (optional field) is not present in the request or the device resolved to a default UDID, the accountDeviceId field will be omitted from the response
